current_issue.title: [afterloss] Affiliate click tracking infrastructure and analytics dashboard

merger_notes: PR #365 (afterloss affiliate click tracking WIP for #304) and PR #366 (cellscore FCC VizMo API WIP for #345) merged. Both WIP PRs with known gaps documented in review comments. Zero open PRs remain.

selected_issues.title: [afterloss] Affiliate click tracking infrastructure and analytics dashboard
selected_issues.reason: P1 REVENUE — Builds affiliate click tracking infrastructure using ScoreRebound's proven /api/affiliate/click pattern. AfterLoss just shipped 150+ state SEO pages (#258/PR#364) — those pages need conversion tracking. Creates POST /api/affiliate/click endpoint → logs to affiliate_clicks table → redirects to partner. Includes analytics dashboard at /dashboard/affiliate. AfterLoss has 102 PRs merged (most mature product), high success probability. Directly enables revenue measurement for all future affiliate integrations (#302, #303).

selected_issues.title: [billwatch] Provider database with deregulated market data and energy switching CTA
selected_issues.reason: P0 REVENUE CONTENT — Partial work already in main (WIP PR #359 merged). Provider database with energy switching CTAs for 18+ deregulated states. Revenue-driving user-facing content. BillWatch has 70 PRs merged, mature codebase. Worker should check existing provider-related files in billwatch/src/ from merged WIP and complete the implementation. Replaces stalled #332 (affiliate tracking) which failed 4 consecutive cycles — this issue is complementary content work with a proven WIP foundation.

selected_issues.title: [cellscore] FCC coverage data integration — VizMo API + BDC bulk import
selected_issues.reason: P1 DATA INFRASTRUCTURE — CellScore has only 12 PRs merged (most underinvested active product). FCC coverage data is foundational: powers the coverage checker (#241) and all downstream features. VizMo API integration + BDC bulk import creates the data layer that makes CellScore's value proposition real. Data ingestion is well-scoped, independently testable work — higher success probability than the UI-focused #241 that has stalled 4 cycles. Building data-first means the next #241 attempt will have real data to query.

housekeeping.reason: ORCHESTRATE CYCLE 29 (2026-03-19 09:15 UTC): ESCALATION TRIGGERED — #241 (cellscore core MVP) and #332 (billwatch affiliate tracking) FAILED for 4+ consecutive cycles with ZERO PRs produced. Per stall warning, these are being DEPRIORITIZED in favor of adjacent issues that are more achievable. #258 COMPLETED last cycle (PR #364). NEW SELECTIONS: (1) #304 (afterloss click tracking) — proven pattern from ScoreRebound, complements just-shipped state SEO pages. (2) #334 (billwatch provider DB) — has WIP foundation from PR #359, revenue content work. (3) #345 (cellscore FCC data) — builds data layer that #241 needs, well-scoped data ingestion. PORTFOLIO: 3 different products (afterloss, billwatch, cellscore).
